termlyFees.note: Average termly fee across all UK private schools (day pupils). ISC annual census data.

pupilTransfers.note: Cumulative estimated pupils moved from private to state sector following VAT introduction in January 2025.

schoolClosures.note: Private schools that have closed or merged since September 2024. Mainly smaller prep schools with under 100 pupils.

sources.name: Independent Schools Council
sources.dataset: Annual census — fee levels and pupil numbers

sources.name: MHCLG / DfE
sources.dataset: State school pupil numbers — in-year transfers

metadata.methodology: Average termly fees from ISC census which covers approximately 80% of private school pupils. Pupil transfers are estimated from state school in-year admission data and DfE school census comparison, adjusted for demographic trends. School closures from ISC membership data and Companies House filings.
knownIssues: VAT introduced January 2025 — data for full academic year impact not yet available
Pupil transfer estimates subject to significant uncertainty as state school census data lags by 6-12 months
ISC census does not cover all private schools — smaller independent schools may have higher closure rate
